title: Random thing mod (Discontinued)
description:
Random things in the mod, but there's an powerful item YOU can obtain.
(!) This mod has been discontinued.
body:
```This mod is now archived, due to being abandoned, older forge version and mod files have been lost.```


# Random Thing Mod

Adds **OP** items, _Weird stuff_ and more!
**_(NOTE: Mod may have bugs during this time, that's why the files mostly have beta or alpha.)_**

---------------------------------------------------------
The purpose of the mod is to add some items that i really wanted but it never existed, so that is why i made this mod.
I ask suggestions from my friends, they're not really mod creators but i just ask.

For entertainment purposes, also for servers like aternos.


```
Mod created in MCreator 2023.4
```
**
Mod does not fully support server management, as admin menu can be accessed without operator (probably)**
